steps.title: Find a count below thirty-six
steps.content: The assertion says 36 cheekscaled frillgobies at station 3 was not the lowest count. The blank must provide a valid station count lower than 36.

steps.title: Reject bad data points
steps.content:
• Choice A gives 338, which is higher than 36.
  • Choice B gives 9 but misidentifies the species.
  • Choice D gives 65, which is higher than 36.

steps.title: Use the lower count
steps.content: The remaining choice gives a count of 9 spotted frillgobies at station 3, proving that 36 was not the lowest count. The answer is C.
